## CatalogComponent type

Loose component type — entries receive runtime-shaped props from the protocol stream, so we don't enforce per-component prop typing here.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type CatalogComponent = ComponentType<GenericComponentProps>;
```

**References:** [GenericComponentProps](./genui-a2ui.genericcomponentprops.md)
